scale_note: Scale 0-100. 69 = the critical stupidity line. The higher, the more Idiocracy.

world.label: We crossed the 69 line. Brawndo won.
world.headline: The planet sets a new record: cage fights, viral conspiracies, and leaders governing by meme.

spotlight.headline: UFC fight held on the White House lawn for Trump's 80th birthday
spotlight.why: An octagon set up in front of the Oval Office, 'USA! USA!' chants, and a president hyping the bout. President Camacho couldn't have done it better.

countries.name: United States
countries.headline: UFC fight staged on the White House lawn for the president's 80th birthday.
countries.why: Governance as spectacle, science replaced by posts, and a cult of brute force worthy of President Camacho.

countries.name: Russia
countries.headline: New law punishing the act of 'searching' for info online.
countries.why: When loading a web page becomes a crime, you've left reality behind.

countries.name: El Salvador
countries.headline: Entire national budget re-gambled on a cryptocurrency.
countries.why: The public treasury treated like a casino chip.

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.headline: Yet another parliamentary debate over the shape of bananas.
countries.why: The fine art of turning a non-issue into a national crisis.

countries.name: India
countries.headline: Minister recommends cow dung as an antiviral.
countries.why: Pseudoscience promoted to public health policy.

countries.name: France
countries.headline: Strike against a reform, then a strike against its cancellation.
countries.why: The reflex to oppose before reading the text.

countries.name: China
countries.headline: Bonus social-credit points for snitching on your neighbors.

countries.name: Italy
countries.headline: Influencer elected mayor on a promise of a theme park.
countries.why: The whole platform fits in a single story.

countries.name: Australia
countries.headline: National debate: have the emus won another war?

countries.name: Germany
countries.headline: A 14-page form to report one too many forms.

countries.name: Japan
countries.headline: Robot resigns, deemed overworked by its human coworkers.
countries.why: At least someone's paying attention to well-being.

countries.name: Canada
countries.headline: Official apology issued to a moose.

countries.name: Sweden
countries.headline: Coffee break nearly written into the constitution.
countries.why: The fika as a bulwark against stupidity.

countries.name: Finland
countries.headline: Mandatory class on spotting fake news starting in elementary school.
countries.why: World champion at resisting disinformation. Bravo.
